languages.text: {n}Тихий щелчок оповещает, что собеседница отключила вокс-канал одновременно с вами.{/n}
{n}A quiet click reveals that your interlocutor has turned off the vox-channel at the same time as you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}静かなクリックで、相手が同時に接続を切っていることがわかる.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un leve chasquido revela que tu interlocutor y tú habéis desconectado el canal de voco al mismo tiempo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet click reveals that your interlocutor has turned off the vox-channel at the same time as you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un leve chasquido revela que tu interlocutor y tú habéis desconectado el canal de voco al mismo tiempo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一声轻微的咔哒声传来——对方与你同时关闭了音阵频道。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet click reveals that your interlocutor has turned off the vox-channel at the same time as you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein leises Klicken belegt, dass dein Gesprächspartner den Voxkanal gleichzeitig mit dir geschlossen hat.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet click reveals that your interlocutor has turned off the vox-channel at the same time as you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sessiz bir tık sesi, muhatabının voks kanalını seninle aynı anda kapattığını ortaya koyuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un léger clic vous indique que votre interlocuteur a coupé le canal-vos en même temps que vous.{/n}
